docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE EDGE ELECTRONICS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NA PAUL HAZEN , PRES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
